query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus, o.userId, o.customerName
FROM orders o
WHERE o.customerName LIKE '%Rangan%'
ORDER BY o.id DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus, o.userId, o.customerName
FROM orders o
WHERE o.customerName LIKE '%Rangan%'
ORDER BY o.id DESC;
